reviews.title: WAY too tight over the foot.  NOT for Diabetics, IMHO!
reviews.text:
I've had these on for about an hour now, so I am sure they are not returnable. That's too bad, because an hour has shown me that they are very uncomfortable. I cannot imagine who would find them wearable. Maybe someone with abnormally narrow feet.

The VERY stretchy material they are made from makes them hard to get on. You MUST use a shoehorn, and even then, it is not easy. They also - unpleasantly - squeeze the foot. After an hour, my toes are getting cold from low circulation! Seriously! Plus, the material does not breathe well, despite it's "perforated" appearance. So my feet are hot and wet.

The laces are just decoration. It's the tight material that holds them on. Plus, the artsy-craftsy arch inset in the instep is an invitation to soiling underneath it, without giving much arch support.
Could these be knock-offs? I assumed the attractive price was because they are a discontinued color. Maybe they are just fakes!.

PS THESE ARE NOT FOR DIABETICS. There is too much restriction of circulation.

I was advised to get "caged" Ultraboosts...the ones that lace normally. (The "cage" is the plastic framework for the laces.) But I liked the color of these.

Big mistake.

title: ASICS Mens Gel-Venture 6 Running Shoe
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: Rubber sole

Rearfoot GEL cushioning
Removable sockliner accommodates medical orthotics

AHAR outsole rubber in critical high-wear areas

title: EZ-STIK 13.1 Half Marathon Decal Sticker 6" 5k 10k Running Shoes runnerA010
description: There is no background color. The surface that you apply the sticker to will become your background color. This will be a single color sticker. This is a DIE-CUT vinyl decal meaning that the background has been trimmed off. If there is a background color in the picture, it is used only as a representation. The background color will be the surface color you place the sticker on (or clear if you put it on a window). The decal will come with clear transfer tape, so you can easily apply it to anything you like (walls, windows, cars, mailbox, mirrors, laptops, etc etc etc). I use PREMIUM Oracal brand vinyl for all decals. Application is relatively easy. Your decal will come as THREE pieces - the backing paper, the sticker itself, and the clear transfer tape. Make sure you are applying to a CLEAN surface. You carefully pull the clear transfer tape up from the backing paper, making sure that it pulls the sticker up with it (if it does not, then firmly press down on it with a squee-gee or credit card or something similar until it sticks properly to the clear transfer tape). Then you apply the sticker and clear transfer tape to whatever surface you would like the decal on. You then use a squee-gee or credit card or something similar to firmly press down once again, making sure that the sticker STICKS, and then you carefully and slowly remove the clear transfer tape from the top, leaving behind only the sticker. I have found that on some surfaces (especially walls and wood surfaces), it helps to leave the clear transfer tape on for awhile to make sure everything is sticking well before removing it. I do not issue refunds or exchanges on vinyl decals. Please understand this before you bid. Some decals are more difficult to apply than others (especially the little ones!) - likewise, some surfaces are more difficult to apply decals to.
features: Easy to Apply

title: Brooks Women's Adrenaline GTS 22 Supportive Running Shoe
description: Smooth and steady wins the run: our most-loved support shoe is better than ever. With an updated midsole made with 100% DNA LOFT, and featuring our trusted GuideRails support, the Adrenaline GTS 22 delivers our smoothest ride yet.
features: Imported

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride, with great cushion and trusted GuideRails support that won’t distract from the fun of the run. This Brooks Adrenaline GTS 22 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides just the right amount of stability and support, great for overpronation while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Adrenaline GTS 21
BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: The updated midsole is now 100% DNA LOFT cushioning paired with the Segmented Crash Pad for an even softer, smoother ride and easier flow from landing to toe-off.
MODERNIZED FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology offers the structure and proven fit the Adrenaline is known for without excess bulk.

GUIDERAILS HOLISTIC SUPPORT SYSTEM: We've shifted our focus beyond the feet to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees. GuideRails keep you moving comfortably by keeping excess movement in check.

reviews.title: Great Fit
reviews.text: Brooks are my favorite!  I'm on my feet a lot either working out or walking they always give me the support I need and they are comfortable all day!  I am 5' 10", 175lbs & 57 years young! I ordered a 10.5 and they fit perfectly.  I stopped buying size 10 altogether in all brands I think my feet got bigger as I got older and even though I don't like it the 10.5 gives my toes a little more room and being on the go I'm more about comfort and support.  They are always stylish and these are light grey, pink and black! Highly recommend!

reviews.text: At first glance these shoes looked ideal. The uppers are mesh and they tie. The black and white look sporty. But the shoes left a,cut on the top of my left foot. The piece that holds the lace is not padded and it rubbed and cut the top of the foot. The right one was okay. Just not acceptable. I suppose yoi could afgix pads to prevent the rubbing or better yet buy shoes without that problem.

reviews.title: Great for walking and running, on even or paved surfaces.
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:c1b550fb45bc70f6146cd85777443b05]] The M MGRNDL sneakers are light, a bit flexible, and the air cushion design provides a cushioned impact. They have a good grip on surfaces, so they provide stability.

They do look good and the upper mesh fabric has some breathable properties.

They do a good job when walking and running short distances.
I would have liked if they mold to the foot better and had softer fabric, but at this price point it might be hard to find.

The M MGRNDL might not provide a good experience when running on uneven surfaces. They are not as comfortable as other well known and higher priced (twice as much) running sneakers brands.
The air cushion do provide a bit of support and comfort when running on even ground, such as concrete, pavement, grass or sand.
They do provide some level of impact resistant and support on the feet.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT SHOES RECOMMENDED BY PHYSICAL THERAPIST
reviews.text: I was recently diagnosed with Osteonecrosis and had to have a right total hip replacement due to collapsed hip socket.  My physical therapist recommended these for excellent support, mostly for my heel and ankle.  She was spot on.  Once the shoes were "broken in" they are wonderfully comfortable.  I did find them a bit tight across the top of my foot but gradually relaxed as I wore them.  I like that the tongues are also laced in.

reviews.title: Brooks is awesome yet again!
reviews.text: Love Brooks! My favorite running shows! They are consistently awesome no matter the model.

reviews.title: LOVE Brooks Tennies!!!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of Brooks and I’ll never buy anything else. They are SUPER comfy and SUPER durable. I have a history of Plantar Fasciitis (as many people who have worked 12-hr hosp shifts), and I’m EXTREMELY picky about my shoes. Brooks have EXCELLENT arch support. I require orthotics in most shoes that I wear, but not Brooks. I had my last pair for over 3 yrs of frequent wear. They are still structurally sound, but showing some cosmetic signs of wear. I bought this new pair for our 3-month trip in Europe. I have worn them for a week, and that is plenty to be assured that they are “broken in”. They are super comfy right out of the box!!

reviews.title: Great shoes for being in your feet. Lost a bit of cushion compared to previous versions.
reviews.text: I love Brooks and I’ve always worn Ravenna’s. I’m an ER nurse and I walk a lot, these are my go to work shoe. I wish there was a wee bit more arch support and I seem to feel they used to have more cushion overall, but an insert will make them perfect.

reviews.title: TREAT IT LIKE A SOCK
reviews.text:
PROS: Lightweight; very soft rubber soles (I would say strictly intended for inside use if you want them to last); and extremely comfortable.
CONS: Laces are too long (I replaced with "Lock Laces"); there's a learning curve to putting them on so as to avoid pulled muscles, damaged back, dislocated shoulder. Think about how you put on socks, then practice. These are not "shoes."

reviews.title: Very nice comfortable shoes
reviews.text: I like them very much, stylish, lots of compliments.  Color is perfect. (light Blue)

reviews.title: It's okay!
reviews.text:
These are based off the famous shoe from the other brand , it rhymes with Beezy450, which costs $100s of dollars! They are just a sock mesh put into a mold, where hot rubber is poured into the bottom which makes the sole. Put in a soft insole and boom, you got a foam runner shoe. Well these shoes are the same thing as the big brand, just without any logos.
The fit is not good for wide feet. They are only good for narrow and normal. If your feet is identical to the mold that they use for generic sizes, then it will fit you perfect and be very comfortable.
These are casual shoes and won't be great for dedicated sports like basketball or cross-country. 5-stars for being a great alternative to big name brands and for being very affordable. I can't think of anything bad to say about this shoe.

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: These shoes are lightweight, trendy & comfortable. Most shoes don't have all 3 for me. The price is great and are better than some of the tip brands out there. I definitely recommend these shoes. The quality is better than I expected.

reviews.title: Fit was expected
reviews.text: These are comparable to my name-brand sneakers. They fit well and are comfortable to wear, I'm very pleased with them and recommend them.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Roav V1 Running Shoe
description: The impressive New Balance Fresh Foam Roav running shoes are loaded with built-in technology to make your day more enjoyable. The midsole features Fresh Foam cushioning which provides a feeling of plush comfort while remaining lightweight. NDurance technology makes the rubber outsole more durable so you can wear these shoes whether you're strutting on the sidewalk or jogging off-road. Finally, the Ultra Heel is strategically-designed to hug the back of your foot for a more supportive fit. These workout shoes are designed with your comfort in mind. The neutral cushioned running shoes hug your foot in its natural position to provide a lightly supported ride. Each element of the shoe's design is thoughtfully selected to ensure your feet are happy after daily wear. Made with a synthetic/mesh upper, these athletic shoes offer effortless wear and style. The bootie construction allows for easy on-and-off, while the stretch webbing offers even more comfort and a customized fit. These breathable shoes are here to support you through each stride, lift, squat or stretch. Weather you're exploring the city, hitting the gym or running a quick mile, opt for a shoe that keeps your foot supported while providing a cloud-like ride.
features: 100% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole

Truly Unique: The New Balance Fresh Foam Roav v1 running shoes are the ultimate in casual athletic style. Pairing a bold, attractive look with plush comfort, these cushioned running shoes are in a league of their own.

Fresh Foam Midsole: Feel like you're running or walking in the clouds. The first of three proprietary technologies in this athletic shoe, Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride.

NDurance Outsole: Step up your game without wearing out your favorite running shoes. Ndurance rubber outsole technology provides superior durability in high-wear areas to help get more out of the shoes.

Ultra Heel: These neutral running shoes boast a head-turning heel that performs as well as it looks. The Ultra Heel design hugs the back of the foot for a snug, supportive fit. This unique heel works alongside the bootie upper for all-day comfort.
8mm Drop: These lightweight shoes feature a heel-to-toe drop of approximately 8mm. Due to variances created during development and manufacturing processes, references to 8mm are approximate.

reviews.title: Beyond comfortable
reviews.text: I love everything about these shoes. I bought them as a walking shoe to wear during our cruise. I actually wore them during our stop in San Juan. We walked over 25,000 steps in San Juan on a self walking tour and these were beyond comfortable. My feet felt great all day wearing them, I never had a problem with them pinching or rubbing my heels. New balance makes some of the best running shoes (in my opinion) and these Roav's did not disappoint. I will be buying additional pairs in other colors.

reviews.title: Satisfied customer!
reviews.text: I've had these for about a week, using them for workouts and soon running.  Honestly so far the most comfortable light weight shoes to date. I love them. I wear size 7 1/2 to 8 I was happy to see they came in 7 1/2 wide, perfect!!

reviews.title: A must buy!!
reviews.text: Adorable!! My daughter LOVES them!!!!

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.text: These are very comfortable and don’t make my feet tired.

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.text: I expected way more for the cost. These shoes are terrible to put on! I have RA and most days i dont want to struggle with putting on my shoes and socks..im so disappointed😞

title: New Balance Women's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: We stand for something bigger than sneakers. We champion those who are fearlessly driven by their passions. We elevate sport. We do right by people and the planet. Together, we drive meaningful change in communities around the world. We Got Now.
features: Imported
Rubber sole

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

reviews.title: Great for trail hiking
reviews.text:
These are great! This is the second pair of owned, just a different color style this time.
I did notice one is a bit more snug than the other, but that could just be my foot. Also I know they'll stretch out over time. The comfort and support are great, the treads are just right for our rocky environment in southeast Oregon.
I'm usually a 9.5 W in some brands. I bought these in a 10 regular, not wide width. The length and width are just right for me.

These also have great support for cardio workouts and walking/hiking long distances, especially on rough terrain.

reviews.title: Fit as expected.
reviews.text: I use these for walking outside of the house, as I have a fractured spine and need the shock absorption and comfort.  These are perfect.  Thank you!

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: I love the design. They fit a little small but I’m sure they will stretch out a bit. They are very comfortable and have really good grip.

reviews.title: Must Buy
reviews.text: Awesome shoes and great price!!

reviews.title: great buy
reviews.text: Comfortable

description: NON CONNECTED EDITION: These shoes are not equipped with UA's Record Sensor & will not pair to your phone (Connected Edition available on ua.com & at UA Brand House). UA HOVR technology provides ‘zero gravity feel’ to maintain energy return that helps eliminate impact step after step. Compression mesh Energy Web contains & molds UA HOVR foam to give back the energy you put in. NEUTRAL: For runners who need a balance of flexibility & cushioning. Soft knit up.
features: Rubber sole

reviews.text: They fit perfect however I didn’t like the color so I returned them. The white didn’t look white.

reviews.title: comfortable
reviews.text: Got these for my mom -not a runner but walks a lot and needs something soid for balance and fast walking. These were a good deal and were super comfortable.

title: Yontune 2X Headlights for Crocs/Sneakers, LED Shoe Lights for Night Safety Running Shoe Lights for Night Runner Funny Gifts for Hiking Camping Walking The Dogs (Red)
features: ⛈️【High Quality & Weatherproof】Our runner shoe lights are made of aluminum alloy and ABS plastic, IPX5 Waterproof, these lights for shoes are built to withstand the toughest rainstorm. Rather it be snow or heavy rain, our gear got your cover.

🔆【Lightweight & Bright】They are pretty lightweight (each light weights only 25g). It stays stable while you walk or run without you even notice. These shoe lights for night safety are bright which can increase your visibility to avoid tripping on things and seeing the path. Let you see and be seen safely in the dark from dusk till dawn.

💡【Upgraded Hidden Switch】Press on the head of the shoe light to turn on/off and switch 3 different modes base on your need (Always Bright, Flashing, or Flashing slowly). It can retain power for 72 hours on its highest setting. An essential safety equipment for any low-light activity.

✨【Easy to Install】Night runner shoe lights the bottom design allows you to fix the shoe light on your shoelace or straps firmly. Note: Please remove the insulating paper between the two batteries at first.

🏃🏽【Application to All Outdoor Activities】Runners shoe lights for night safety, these lights for shoes are hands-free lighting solution for runners, hikers, or any outdoor enthusiast. You can safely trek through mountains, trails, or your own neighborhood knowing you’ve got reliable, safe lighting at all times. Whether running, cycling, walking, hiking, camping, fishing, or walking your dog.

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text: I was excited to receive these. I also have a pair that stick in the hole on the shoes. I prefer these, however, because you can adjust where the beam is directed by moving the heel strap around. I use my crocs for taking care of the chickens. So this is great for the walk to the coop every night.

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.text: Great little product gives good light and I can pop them on my tennis shoes for camping.

reviews.title: Fun little headlights for your shoes
reviews.text: I've had these lights on my shoes full time for the last few days, and I really like them for evening walks.  They don't replace a flashlight, but they do light up a fair amount of the path that I wouldn't otherwise see with my small flashlight.  I've smacked them against car doors and chair rails a few times, and they've stayed solidly on my feet and are no worse for wear.  They are great for visibility for others too - your feet move a lot, and so do these lights.  Add flashing and you're much more visible either walking or on a bicycle.  I think they'd also be great for camping, and maybe at a dance party (flashing feet might be fun!)  My only thought is that they seem a little pricey, but they are one of the few that go on shoe laces and not just popping into holes in Crocs.  They're quite sturdy and battery life is great too.

reviews.title: Perfect for early morning/night walking
reviews.text: I bought these lights for an upcoming hike to the Grand Canyon in October. We need to start our hike before sunrise and thought these would be the perfect accessory to stop us from tripping in the dark. What I like - they are small and lightweight, with a secure clip for my shoes. The battery is a standard size. They are easy to turn off and on. I'm undecided on if these are really bright enough to be practical... is there a light - yes. Is it going to replace a flashlight - absolutely not. I don't know if I'd buy these again for the purpose of a hike, but they would be good if you are an early morning/late evening walker and runner and want additional lights for safety so cars, etc, can see you.

reviews.title: They are ok
reviews.text:
Batteries are not working. I have to replace them right from the start. I hope they will work.

They seem a bit heavy but I will use them. Safety is more important.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Kenun Lyte MX Running Shoes
description: Cloud-like comfort meets street-forward style in the ultra-lightweight GEL-Kenun Lyte MX. Fusing the fluid lines of the GEL-Kenun series with seat-belt buckle design inspiration, this cushioned silhouette delivers a secure, supportive fit that works with your natural gait to guide efficient strides all day long. Borrowing from the iconic GEL-LYTE III, a split tongue and plush collar make for an easy-on, easy-off trait that doubles as a style-focused detail. Weight: 6.4. Heel Height: 22. Forefoot Height: 12.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Okay for casual, not a whole lot of support though
reviews.text: Cute shoe but not ideal for being on your feet for hours. I work 12 hour shifts and my heels were killing me the first 12 hour shift I worked in them. If comfort and stability is what you’re going for, I’d go with a different ASICS shoe. I wouldn’t ever run in them and I’m looking for inserts/a new work shoe but I’ll still wear them casually

title: Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe
description: A bit like running in the clouds. Thanks to the increased elasticity of the upper and the super-soft cushioning throughout the length, these men's running shoes are the ultimate comfort. Super soft cushioning. The revised ratio between midsole and outer sole allows you to increase LOFT DNA to achieve even more extreme softness at the sole of the foot, without losing reactivity or endurance. An OrthoLiteTM insole ensures an extraordinary wearing comfort.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin 18 is perfect for runners who think there's no such thing as too much cushioning. The upper enhances comfort by perfectly balancing stretch and structure.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides neutral support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Glycerin 17.

SUPER-SOFT CUSHIONING: Increased DNA LOFT super-soft cushioning allows for even more extreme softness, without losing responsiveness or durability, while the OrthoLite sockliner provides premium step-in comfort.
PLUSH FIT: The plush feel of an internal stretch bootie surrounds your foot and moves and expands with your stride. The engineered mesh upper enhances the fit.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: The plush transition zone makes every move from heel to toe feel incredibly soft and smooth.

reviews.title: Defective manufacturing
reviews.text: I’m this was my second pair of these shoes within 6 months but this pair is very u comfortable on the left shoe and I can’t do walks in them.  Very disappointed in it... it’s like the left shoe has a defect I it.  Unfortunately I saved the shoe for over a month before I wore it and too late to return.

reviews.title: Great support
reviews.text: These are very comfortable and supportive. I started wearing Brooks when I got planter fasciitis. I haven’t had issues in a long time. I tried another model, but I went back to these.

reviews.title: My Shoe!
reviews.text: These are the only shoes I have been wearing on a daily basis for over 10 years, Brooks Glycerin. My feet have seen many years of 12 hour shifts and are in sad shape. I have a dress pair, a pair I wear indoors, and several pairs for outdoors and yard work.  I can wear a man's 8 1/2 D or a Women's 9 1/2 wide and they fit perfectly.  If you need a cushioned shoe with good support these are the ones to buy.

reviews.title: Don't Buy!!
reviews.text: The shoes are NOT worth 130.00 or 50.00 inserts last less than one month shoes themselves no arch support. In the end caused my feet problems.

reviews.title: Comfortable Shoe
reviews.text: Comfortable shoe however shoes is not black it is a very dark grey with some black trimming.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Contend 6 Running Shoes
features: 100% Synthetic
Rubber sole
AmpliFoam Midsole: Engineered to maintain durability at softer densities, providing better flexibility, comfort, and platform adaptability ideal for natural running.
Ortholite Sockliner: Moisture management (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC).
Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.
GEL Technology: Cushioning provides excellent shock absorption
Ortholite Sockliner: Moisture management (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC).

reviews.title: I love these shoes
reviews.text: I have owned several of this brand and I love them. They are definitely comfortable and last a long time. Great price also.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: I am a runner with bad planters fasciitis and while I still use my own inserts, the shoe is very comfortable.

reviews.title: Best wide width shoes ive had
reviews.text: Great support, very comfortable after my foot surgery.

reviews.title: They felt comfortable, liked the color.
reviews.text:
I ordered these a 1/2 size larger, unfortunately they did not fit. Toes were right at edge.
I tried on one shoe and they felt very nice and soft yet stable at the same time.
I did return them due to the size.
I did not reorder because I have no way of know if I should go up a 1/2 size or a whole.
I’m sure they would be great shoes otherwise.

reviews.title: Enjoying walking again
reviews.text: I'm a size 10.5 on one foot and just barely over a 10 on the other foot. These fit well and work for both feet. I walk 1 to 2 miles a day and was having intense pain in my shins and feet. I did some research and ended up chosing this pair. While these shoes have not gotten rid of all the pain, they have alleviated most of it. It makes me confident that most of the pain from walking was in having the wrong footwear.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 5 Running Shoes
description: Go further than ever before with the GEL-CONTEND 5 extra wide width men's running shoe from ASICS. Created to offer the stability required to help you go the distance this shoe offers a supportive fit thanks to an internal heel counter. Features include a removable sockliner Rearfoot GEL technology and an AMPLIFOAM midsole which ensure your foot remains cushioned every step of the way. The solid rubber outsole and stitch-down toe reinforcement also mean it has a high level of durability while the breathable athletic mesh means that your feet stay fresher for longer as you take on new challenges. Proudly sporting our classic logo on the side you can rest assured that the GEL-CONTEND 5 shoe will give you comfort and protection when you need it most. Weight: 10.25. Heel Height: 22mm. Forefoot Height: 12mm.

reviews.title: Cute and well made but size was inaccurate.
reviews.text: These seem to be very good quality, especially considering how reasonable they were in price, and are super cute in person!  However, I ordered an 8T and what I received must be a kids 8.  They are huge and will not work for my kiddos this summer as I had hoped.  I'll probably just hang on to them for use down the road, but unfortunately it won't be for awhile! Photo is comparison of this shoe to my kiddos other size 8T tennis shoes we just bought.

reviews.title: Kid & mother approved
